_comment: Canonical Notion + Lark MCP server definitions. SECRET-FREE: each server self-runs `api_keys export` to pull credentials from the macOS Keychain at launch, then execs the real MCP server. install.sh registers these at USER scope (claude mcp add-json -s user) so they load in every Claude Code session. This file is ALSO a valid drop-in project `.mcp.json` (copy it into a repo and approve via enabledMcpjsonServers).

args: eval "$("$HOME/bin/api_keys" export)" && export NOTION_TOKEN="$NOTION_API_KEY" && exec npx -y @notionhq/notion-mcp-server
eval "$("$HOME/bin/api_keys" export)" && exec npx -y @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp mcp -a "$LARK_APP_ID" -s "$LARK_APP_SECRET" -d https://open.larksuite.com
